name: qiushi-systems-engineering
description: 求是系统工程方法论：28 个 AI Agent 方法论 Skill，基于毛泽东哲学方法论与钱学森系统工程论，组织为七环认知闭环。每次会话启动自动注入实事求是总原则与认知环路由器。
author: Asukaleo-aa

commands.name: arming-thought
commands.description: 武装思想：实事求是总原则 + 认知环路由器

commands.name: investigation-first
commands.description: 调查研究：先调查再发言

commands.name: state-estimation
commands.description: 状态估计：从噪声推断隐藏状态

commands.name: mass-line
commands.description: 群众路线：收集→集中→返回→检验

commands.name: contradiction-analysis
commands.description: 矛盾分析：识别矛盾→判定主次→主攻方向

commands.name: first-principles-analysis
commands.description: 第一性原理：剥离假设到不可再分

commands.name: historical-evolution-analysis
commands.description: 历史演化：追溯因果链理解现状

commands.name: systems-thinking-framework
commands.description: 系统思维：六步建立系统世界观

commands.name: system-boundary-structuring
commands.description: 边界结构：层次分解+接口契约

commands.name: quantitative-modeling-workflow
commands.description: 定量建模：定性→定量跃迁

commands.name: meta-synthesis-engine
commands.description: 综合集成：统一判断

commands.name: constrained-optimization
commands.description: 约束优化：约束下最优决策

commands.name: hierarchical-decomposition-coordination
commands.description: 递阶分解：大系统自治+协调

commands.name: duality-complementarity-analysis
commands.description: 对偶分析：正向不通→构造对偶

commands.name: perturbation-progressive-method
commands.description: 摄动渐进：逐步逼近精确解

commands.name: multi-representation-equivalence-transform
commands.description: 表述变换：时域↔频域切换

commands.name: engineering-orchestration
commands.description: 工程编排：WBS+关键路径+质量门

commands.name: concentrate-forces
commands.description: 集中兵力：确定主攻方向

commands.name: spark-prairie-fire
commands.description: 星火燎原：最小可行切入点

commands.name: protracted-strategy
commands.description: 持久战略：防御→相持→反攻

commands.name: overall-planning
commands.description: 统筹兼顾：多目标动态平衡

commands.name: practice-cognition
commands.description: 实践认识：实践→认识→再实践

commands.name: simulation-validation-cycle
commands.description: 仿真验证：多场景+边界测试

commands.name: feedback-and-revision-loop
commands.description: 反馈修正：偏差→根因→修正

commands.name: criticism-self-criticism
commands.description: 批评与自我批评：结构化审视

commands.name: adaptive-robust-strategy
commands.description: 自适应策略：在不确定中保持最优

commands.name: workflows
commands.description: 工作流：三条标准化跨环流水线

skills.description: 28 个方法论 skill，按认知环组织
